disclaimer: Prototype values are demo market bands. Connect Agmarknet/eNAM APIs or official exports before production use.

districts.name: Hisar
districts.climateNote: Semi-arid; watch hot wind, irrigation timing, and sowing after useful rainfall.

districts.name: Karnal
districts.climateNote: Rice-wheat belt; drainage and stubble-to-compost planning matter during monsoon.

districts.name: Sirsa
districts.climateNote: Cotton and bajra zone; monitor heat stress, whitefly risk, and irrigation intervals.

crops.name: Wheat
crops.marketNote: Rabi arrival pressure eases after peak harvest; verify MSP and nearby mandi quote before sale.

crops.name: Pearl millet
crops.marketNote: Demand depends on feed and flour buyers; sowing timing matters more than short-term selling signals now.

crops.name: Green gram
crops.marketNote: Quality, moisture, and pulse demand can move prices quickly; clean and dry produce before sale.

crops.name: Mustard
crops.marketNote: Oilseed prices react to oil demand and imports; compare mandi, processor, and storage options.

crops.name: Cotton
crops.marketNote: Lint quality and pest damage affect realized price; preserve crop health before harvest.
